forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+---
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '80'
+title: 'Package scaffolding: Package.swift, targets, CI'
+---
+## What
+Per plan.md §3/§10 task 1. Create the Swift package skeleton in this repo:
+- `Package.swift`: swift-tools-version 6.2, platform macOS 27; dependencies `FoundationModelsOperationTool` (github swissarmyhammer, branch `main`, products `Operations` + `OperationsCLI`) and `FoundationModelsCodeContext` (github swissarmyhammer, branch `main`).
+- Targets: library `FileTool` (`Sources/FileTool/`), test targets `FileToolTests` and `FileToolIntegrationTests` (`Tests/...`), executable `file-demo` (`Examples/FileDemo/Sources/file-demo/`) declared in the root `Package.swift` (siblings' Examples-as-root-targets convention).
+- CI workflow `.github/workflows/ci.yml`: `swift build && swift test` on a macOS 27 runner.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] `swift build` succeeds from repo root (all targets, including file-demo)
+- [ ] `swift test` runs both test targets green
+- [ ] CI workflow file present and referencing macOS 27 runner
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] Placeholder swift-testing `@Test` in `Tests/FileToolTests/` and `Tests/FileToolIntegrationTests/` (asserting a trivial truth) — proves targets compile and run
+- [ ] Run `swift test` — expect: all tests pass
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd` — write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
\ No newline at end of file

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -4,6 +4,34 @@
   id: 01kxk0q767zg034ac21g76j8da
   text: Picked up by /finish (scoped-batch, no filter). First ready task; review column empty. No project scaffolding on disk yet — this task creates Package.swift and the target layout. Starting implement→test→commit→review loop.
   timestamp: 2026-07-15T13:51:04.903397+00:00
+- actor: claude-code
+  id: 01kxk0zseyyppj9j0t4530wd58
+  text: |-
+    BLOCKED on an upstream dependency conflict discovered when combining the two required deps for the first time.
+
+    Scaffolding is written and in place:
+    - Package.swift (tools 6.2, macOS 27; deps FoundationModelsOperationTool [Operations+OperationsCLI] and FoundationModelsCodeContext, both branch main; targets FileTool, file-demo, FileToolTests, FileToolIntegrationTests per §3 layout)
+    - Sources/FileTool/FileTool.swift (module placeholder)
+    - Examples/FileDemo/Sources/file-demo/main.swift (executable placeholder)
+    - Tests/FileToolTests/ScaffoldTests.swift + Tests/FileToolIntegrationTests/ScaffoldTests.swift (swift-testing @Test placeholders)
+    - .github/workflows/ci.yml (swift build && swift test on macos-27)
+    - .gitignore verified to already cover /.build and .swiftpm/ (not recreated)
+
+    `swift build` FAILS at dependency resolution — NOT a code/manifest error:
+      error: 'mlx-swift-lm' depends on 'swift-syntax' 602.0.0..<604.0.0; 'swift-syntax' >= 604.0.0 is required because ... 'foundationmodelsoperationtool' depends on 'swift-syntax' 604.0.0-latest..<605.0.0.
+
+    Chain:
+    - FileTool -> FoundationModelsOperationTool -> swift-syntax `from: 604.0.0-latest`  => needs [604,605)
+    - FileTool -> FoundationModelsCodeContext -> FoundationModelsRanker -> mlx-swift-lm (branch foundationmodels-fixes) -> swift-syntax "602.0.0"..<"604.0.0"  => needs [602,604)
+
+    The two ranges are DISJOINT, so SwiftPM cannot resolve, and a top-level pin cannot bridge disjoint ranges. FileTool is the first package in the org to depend on BOTH OperationTool and CodeContext, so this has never surfaced. This is a plan-level blocker (every task depends on task 1 building), not specific to scaffolding.
+
+    Resolution requires an upstream change in another repo (out of scope for "Package scaffolding"), one of:
+      (a) widen mlx-swift-lm's swift-syntax range on branch `foundationmodels-fixes` to include 604 (verify it compiles against 604; affects Ranker/Router/Multitool/MetadataRegistry too), or
+      (b) relax FoundationModelsOperationTool's swift-syntax requirement below 604 (likely needs 604 macro APIs).
+
+    Filed as a separate blocking task. Task left in `doing`.
+  timestamp: 2026-07-15T13:55:45.758962+00:00
 position_column: doing
 position_ordinal: '80'
 title: 'Package scaffolding: Package.swift, targets, CI'
